expectations.evidence: 03-classify-alerts.sh uses jq select with path pattern matching on most_recent_instance.location.path.
02-triage-heuristics.md documents bare image refs and system library paths as base image. Decision tree correctly identifies /usr/lib and /lib as base image.
Identifies /usr/local/bin/realestate-backend, /usr/bin/caddy, /srv/, /app/ as our code. Includes lang-go and lang-rust tags.
05-workflow-runbook.md provides fix guidance: cargo update for Rust crates, Go dep bumps for Caddy, Dockerfile edits for IaC.
04-dismiss-base-image-alerts.sh uses dismissed_reason="won't fix" (with space). The valid API value is 'won't_fix' (with underscore). This would fail at runtime.

summary: 4/5 assertions passed. Without the skill, the agent produced comprehensive triage logic but used an invalid dismissed_reason value ('won't fix' instead of 'won't_fix') and produced bash scripts instead of PowerShell.
